name: xray-tunnel
postAttachCommand: curl -sL https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/latest/download/Xray-linux-64.zip -o /tmp/xray.zip && unzip -o /tmp/xray.zip -d /tmp/xray && sudo mv /tmp/xray/xray /usr/local/bin/xray && sudo mkdir -p /etc/xray && sudo cp /workspaces/xray-tunnel/config.json /etc/xray/config.json && sudo xray run -config /etc/xray/config.json > /tmp/xray.log 2>&1 &
